nodes.itemHTML: • mixpanelstars37 - Mixpanel is a library for tracking events and sending Mixpanel profile updates to Mixpanel from your go applications.

• Testing Frameworks
    • apitest - Simple and extensible behavioural testing library for REST based services or HTTP handlers that supports mocking external http calls and rendering of sequence diagrams.
    • assertstars32 - Basic Assertion Library used along side native go testing, with building blocks for custom assertions.
    • badiostars10 - Extensions to Go's testing/iotest package.
    • baloostars707 - Expressive and versatile end-to-end HTTP API testing made easy.
    • biffstars10 - Bifurcation testing framework, BDD compatible.

    • covergatesstars38 - Self-hosted code coverage report review and management service.

    • gomatchstars39 - library created for testing JSON against patterns.
